course_title: PRACTICE I: FOUNDATIONS OF GENERALIST PRACTICE
description: Provides a conceptual base for generalist social work practice at all intervention levels. Helps students learn social work purposes, values, ethics, processes, roles, methods, and integrate social work theory and practice.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Social Work BSW or Social Work MSW

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Social Work BSW or Social Work MSW
